title: calamagrostis × acutiflora var. caucasica
intro: Calamagrostis × acutiflora var. caucasica, also known as the Caucasian feather grass, is a type of ornamental grass that is native to the Caucasus region and is a hybrid of Calamagrostis arundinacea and Calamagrostis epigejos. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Calamagrostis × acutiflora var. caucasica can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
